method: Backtest per-product PnL from prosperity4bt day summary for trader_v4 on round 3 day 2 only (same command as results.json, days arg 3-2).
tte_at_open_note: Per round3description: 7-day option, each round = 1 day; historical example maps day index to TTE. Our tape csv_day 2 uses dte_at_open=6 (plot_iv_smile_round3) and intraday wind.
interpretation: Voucher smile-MM adds ~10 on this day; extract and hydrogel together explain essentially all of the -12677 day total. v6 sets csv_day>=2 to skip extract and hydrogel quotes, keeping the smile-MM thesis on vouchers only for that day.
